title: liliago indica
intro: Liliago indica, also known as the Indian squill or Himalayan squill, is a type of flowering plant in the Asphodelaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Liliago indica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
